issues.title: feat(explore): add topic classification and adversarial lead injection

summary.key_decisions: Label pre-gate placed as top-level section (not numbered step) to match Resume Check style; adversarial lead prompt template embedded inline in 1.2; Post-Conversation Classification numbered 1.1a

issues.title: feat(explore): add rejection record type to crystallize-framework

summary.narrative: Added Rejection Record as 5th supported type in crystallize-framework.md with signals/anti-signals and routing to phase-5-produce-rejection-record.md
summary.key_decisions: Rejection Record placed after No Artifact in supported types table; routing reference establishes contract for Issue 4

issues.title: feat(explore): connect rejection record to produce pipeline

summary.narrative: Wired Rejection Record into Phase 4 evaluator count and Phase 5 produce routing
summary.key_decisions: Simple wiring changes; Rejection Record exclusion in no-artifact path prevents misrouting

issues.title: feat(explore): add rejection record produce path

summary.narrative: Created phase-5-produce-rejection-record.md with artifact template and next-steps instructions
summary.key_decisions: Rejection record uses docs/decisions/REJECTED-<topic>.md path; per-question findings with confidence levels match adversarial lead output format

issues.title: feat(explore): add adversarial demand validation evals

summary.narrative: Added 3 fixture-backed eval cases for adversarial demand validation lead: strong-demand, absent-demand, diagnostic-topic
summary.key_decisions: Each eval prompt embeds the adversarial lead agent prompt template; fixture files are realistic repo artifacts the agent reads to assess demand
